title: Ploiești, Prahova — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ploiești, Prahova: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ploiești is a city in Prahova with a population of 209,945. The center of Romania’s oil industry, a historic city with beautiful 19th-century architecture, museums, and a strategic location near the Carpathian Mountains.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
